name: DW · Dim Customer
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS customer_id,
    'CUST-' || lpad(gs::text, 5, '0')                                          AS customer_code,
    (ARRAY['Alice','Bob','Charlie','Diana','Eve','Frank','Grace','Henry','Ivy','Jack',
           'Kara','Liam','Mona','Noah','Olive','Paul','Quinn','Rosa','Sam','Tina'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('CFN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 20)::int]   AS first_name,
    (ARRAY['Smith','Jones','Brown','Garcia','Miller','Davis','Lopez','Wilson','Lee','Clark',
           'Patel','Nguyen','Kim','Khan','Ali','Reed','Cole','Ford','Hart','Page'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('CLN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 20)::int]   AS last_name,
    'cust' || gs || '@example.com'                                              AS email,
    (ARRAY['New York','Chicago','LA','Houston','Miami','Seattle','Boston','Denver','Atlanta','Austin'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('CCITY'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)::int] AS city,
    (ARRAY['NY','IL','CA','TX','FL','WA','MA','CO','GA','TX'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('CCITY'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)::int] AS state,  -- aligned to city salt for consistency
    (ARRAY['Consumer','SMB','Enterprise','Government'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('CSEG'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)::int]   AS segment,
    (ARRAY['Bronze','Silver','Gold','Platinum'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('CTIER'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)::int]  AS loyalty_tier,
    CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('CACQ'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1095)::int AS acquisition_date,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('CLTV'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 50000)::int + 100)::numeric, 2) AS lifetime_value
FROM generate_series(1, 2000) AS gs
